creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Created attachment 165758
path with update to 5.1.4

Hello,

attached a patch to update the port to its current version.

portline complains about conflict php5-* is too broad, but i ignored this, because this is how the old unsupported PHP port is named. ;)

poudriere build fine for:
9.3 amd + i386
10.1 amd + i386
10.2 amd + i386
11-current r293820 amd + i386

runtime test through executing some testcases where done.

Greetings,
Torsten
